component.description: Positive Voltage Intelligent Protection Device Hotswap Controller and I2C Current Monitor

absolute_maximum_ratings.raw_name: Input voltage range, VCC, Sense, Enable, OUT
Input voltage, common mode, VINP, VINM
Current into SDA, SCL, VS, VINP, VINM, A0, A1, GNDB

electrical_characteristics.raw_name: Input bias current; device enabled; sourcing or sinking

electrical_characteristics.parameter: Current sense threshold with power limiting
electrical_characteristics.raw_name: Current sense threshold V(VCC-SENSE) with power limiting trip
electrical_characteristics.conditions: VPROG = 2.4 V; VOUT = 0 V or VPROG = 0.9 V; VOUT = 30 V; VVCC = 48 V

electrical_characteristics.parameter: Current sense threshold without power limiting
electrical_characteristics.raw_name: Current sense threshold V(VCC-sense) without power limiting trip
Large overload response time to GATE low
electrical_characteristics.conditions: VPROG = 4 V; VOUT = VSENSE; V(VCC-SENSE): 0 rising to 200 mV; C(GATE-OUT) = 2 nF; V(GATE-OUT) = 1 V
VSENSE = VVCC; V(GATE-OUT) = 7 V; VEN = Hi
VEN = Hi; VGATE = VVCC; V(VCC-SENSE) > 200 mV

electrical_characteristics.parameter: Propagation delay EN true to GATE high
electrical_characteristics.raw_name: Propagation delay: EN going true to GATE output high
electrical_characteristics.conditions: VEN = 0 -> 2.5 V, 50% of VEN to 50% of VGATE, VOUT = VVCC, R(GATE-OUT) = 1 MOhm

electrical_characteristics.parameter: Propagation delay EN false to GATE low
electrical_characteristics.raw_name: Propagation delay: EN going false (0 V) to GATE output low
electrical_characteristics.conditions: VEN = 2.5 V -> 0 V, 50% of VEN to 50% of VGATE, VOUT = VVCC, R(GATE-OUT) = 1 MΩ, tFALL < 0.1 µs

electrical_characteristics.parameter: Propagation delay TIMER to GATE low
electrical_characteristics.raw_name: Propagation delay: TIMER expires to GATE output low
electrical_characteristics.conditions: VTIMER: 0 -> 5 V, tRISE < 0.1 µs. 50% of VTIMER to 50% of VGATE, VOUT = VVCC , R(GATE-OUT) = 1 MΩ

electrical_characteristics.raw_name: PG threshold voltage; VOUT rising; PG goes open drain
PG threshold voltage; VOUT falling; PG goes low
PG deglitch delay; detection to output; rising and falling edges

Reference voltage output, used to set power threshold on PROG pin
Main power supply input to device and FET
Positive differential shunt voltage. Connect to positive side of shunt resistor
Negative differential shunt voltage. Connect to negative side of shunt resistor. Bus voltage is measured from this pin to GND
